member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring soft delete behavior in Entity Framework Core.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions.ConfigureSoftDelete(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Configures global query filters for all entities implementing ISoftDeletable. Automatically excludes soft-deleted entities from all queries.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions.SoftDelete(Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable,System.String)
member.summary: Marks an entity as soft-deleted without removing it from the database.
member.param: User ID who is deleting the entity (optional)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions.Restore(Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions.IncludeDeleted``1(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbSet{``0})
member.summary: Queries including soft-deleted entities (bypasses the query filter). Use this when you need to access deleted entities explicitly.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Extensions.SoftDeleteExtensions.OnlyDeleted``1(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbSet{``0})
member.summary: Queries only soft-deleted entities.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable
member.summary: Interface for entities that support soft delete (logical delete). Entities implementing this interface will be filtered automatically by EF Core query filters.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable.IsDeleted
member.summary: Indicates whether the entity has been soft-deleted

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable.DeletedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the entity was soft-deleted (null if not deleted)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.Interfaces.ISoftDeletable.DeletedBy
member.summary: User ID who deleted the entity (optional, for audit purposes)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectChatRepository
member.summary: Service responsible for chat metadata and file operations. Handles chat metadata loading/saving and chat file paths.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectEmbeddingService
member.summary: Service responsible for embedding-related file operations. Handles file splitting, text file detection, and embeddings file list generation.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectEmbeddingService.GetAllProjectEmbeddingsFiles(Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectsRepository)
member.summary: Get list of all embeddings files across all projects for global chat This aggregates embeddings from all non-archived projects

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectFileLocator
member.summary: Service responsible for all project file path operations and file name constants. This centralizes path construction and file existence checks for project files.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectGlobalSettingsRepository
member.summary: Service responsible for project-global configuration and settings. Handles blog categories, snel aanpassen, basis prompt, and user info.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectIntegrationStore
member.summary: Service responsible for WordPress and Social Media integration operations. Handles credential retrieval and social media comment file operations.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectIntegrationStore.GetWordPressCredentials(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve WordPress credentials for a given project, ensuring all fields are present. Throws detailed exceptions on missing or invalid data.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectsRepository
member.summary: Repository responsible for project lifecycle operations only. Handles project creation, loading, saving, listing, and archiving. For file paths, use ProjectFileLocator. For WordPress/Social Media, use ProjectIntegrationStore. For embeddings, use ProjectEmbeddingService. For global settings, use ProjectGlobalSettingsRepository. For chat metadata, use ProjectChatRepository.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectsRepository.SetProjectsFolderStatic(System.String)
member.summary: Set the global projects folder path. Must be called exactly once on application start.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.ProjectsRepository.GetProjectsFolderStatic
member.summary: Get the previously set global projects folder path. Throws if not previously initialized.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1
member.summary: Generic repository interface for data access operations. Provides common CRUD operations and query capabilities.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.GetByIdAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its primary key

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Gets all entities

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Finds entities matching a predicate

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.FirstOrDefaultAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Gets the first entity matching a predicate, or null

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.AnyAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Checks if any entity matches a predicate

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.CountAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Counts entities matching a predicate

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.Query
member.summary: Gets a queryable for advanced scenarios (use with caution)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.AddAsync(`0)
member.summary: Adds a new entity

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.AddRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Adds multiple entities

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.UpdateAsync(`0)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.UpdateRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Updates multiple entities

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.DeleteAsync(`0)
member.summary: Deletes an entity

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.DeleteRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Deletes multiple entities

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.DeleteWhereAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Deletes entities matching a predicate

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.IRepository`1.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Saves all changes to the database Returns the number of affected rows

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.Repositories.Repository`1
member.summary: Generic repository implementation using Entity Framework Core. Provides standard CRUD operations for any entity type.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.SqliteStoreProvider
member.summary: Provides store setup for SQLite backend. SQLite offers single-file database storage with FTS5 full-text search, ideal for local development, embedded scenarios, and portable projects.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SqliteStoreProvider.GetSqliteStoreSetup(HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a store setup using SQLite as the backend
member.param: Project folder for resolving relative database paths (optional)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SqliteStoreProvider.GetMetadataOnlyStoreSetup(HazinaStore.Models.SqliteSettings,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a store setup using SQLite with optional embeddings (metadata-first mode). When embeddings are disabled, the system uses only metadata and full-text search.
member.param: OpenAI API key (still required for LLM operations)
Project folder for resolving relative database paths (optional)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreProvider.GetStoreSetup(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets store setup using file-based storage (legacy method)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreProvider.GetStoreSetup(System.String,Hazina.LLMs.OpenAI.OpenAIConfig)
member.summary: Gets store setup using file-based storage with full OpenAI configuration

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreProvider.GetStoreSetup(HazinaStore.Models.HazinaStoreConfig,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets store setup based on configuration settings. Supports SQLite, file-based, PostgreSQL, Supabase, and hybrid modes.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreProvider.GetSupabaseStoreSetup(HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets store setup using Supabase backend

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreProvider.GetHybridStoreSetup(System.String,HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets store setup using hybrid file/Supabase storage

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreSetup.QueryableMetadataStore
member.summary: Queryable metadata store for metadata-first search. Supports filtering by tags, MIME type, date range, and full-text search.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreSetup.TagRelevanceStore
member.summary: Tag relevance store for persisting tag scores. Optional - if null, tag scores are not persisted.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreSetup.TagScoringService
member.summary: Tag scoring service for computing tag relevance. Optional - if null, uses NoOpTagScoringService (neutral scores).

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Data.StoreSetup.CompositeScorer
member.summary: Composite scorer for combining multiple scoring signals. Optional - if null, uses DefaultCompositeScorer.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.SupabaseStoreProvider
member.summary: Provides store setup for Supabase backend. Since Supabase is PostgreSQL-based with pgvector support, this provider wraps the existing PostgreSQL stores with Supabase configuration.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SupabaseStoreProvider.GetSupabaseStoreSetup(HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a store setup using Supabase as the backend

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SupabaseStoreProvider.GetHybridStoreSetup(System.String,HazinaStore.Models.SupabaseSettings,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a store setup using Supabase with hybrid file/database storage. Files are stored locally, but embeddings and indexes use Supabase.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SupabaseStoreProvider.InitializeSupabaseSchemaAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes Supabase database schema (creates tables if they don't exist)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.SupabaseStoreProvider.TestConnectionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Tests the Supabase connection

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository
member.summary: Repository for tracking and retrieving token usage per project

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository.RecordUsage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Records token usage for a project on the current date

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository.GetUsage(System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Gets token usage summaries for a project within a date range

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository.GetWeekUsage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets aggregated usage for the current week (last 7 days)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository.GetMonthUsage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets aggregated usage for the current month (last 30 days)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository.GetYearUsage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets aggregated usage for the current year (12 months)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageTracker
member.summary: Static utility for tracking token usage across the application

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageTracker.Initialize(Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageRepository)
member.summary: Initialize the tracker with a repository instance

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageTracker.Track(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Tracks token usage for a project. Safe to call even if not initialized.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Data.TokenUsageTracker.TrackAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Tracks token usage asynchronously
